pageContext.name: Ultramarines Venerable Dreadnought
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Joytoy are proud to present the mightiest of the Space Marines, the Ultramarines Venerable Dreadnought!  Containing the mortal remains of a celebrated yet fallen Space Marine, these cybernetic combat walkers allow the oldest and wisest Space Marines to still fight on behalf of the Imperium of Man. Interned in a decorated sarcophagus, they are armed with close and long-range weaponry that have made them formidable for thousands of years. For their experience, wisdom, and unyielding service, the Venerable Dreadnoughts are a legendary guild of warriors that are the vestiges of battles long past.  Warhammer 40k fans, be sure to add the Ultramarines Venerable Dreadnought to your collection today!
